outcome_summary: Corrected headline shape to (M=32, K=5376, N=5376) — the production nsys profile shape. Ran all 4 tracks with 3 steps each. None met the 70-80 µs target. Best: T1 Step 2 TileN=64 at 179.20 µs eager (parity with torch._scaled_mm 180 µs but graph regressed; not promoted). T2 Cutlass C++ atom 362 µs (correct, slow). T3 Triton aborted at Step 1 (silently upcast FP8 to FP16). T4 CuTeDSL inline_asm helper 206 µs (correct, slow but useful infrastructure). Recommendation: keep cuBLASLt, do not promote anything from these 4 tracks.
